raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Prescribing a spiritual practice aimed at deepening connection with a higher power and aligning personal will with divine will.",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "A higher power (God) exists and can be contacted.",
    "Prayer and meditation are effective means to improve contact with that higher power.",
    "This higher power has a specific will for each individual.",
    "It is desirable to know and carry out that will.",
    "The individual has the capacity to carry out that will if given power."
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally coherent as a statement of spiritual intention: it outlines a method (prayer/meditation), a goal (improved conscious contact), and a specific focus (seeking knowledge and power to act).",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": [
    "The individual believes in a higher power or is open to the concept.",
    "The individual finds prayer or meditation meaningful or effective.",
    "The individual values guidance or surrender of personal will.",
    "The individual is seeking practical alignment between actions and perceived divine purpose."
  ],
  "conditions_for_misleading": [
    "If interpreted as requiring belief in a specific deity, it may exclude non-theistic spiritual frameworks.",
    "If taken to imply that personal judgment should be fully abandoned, it could lead to passivity or harmful actions rationalized as divine will.",
    "If the statement is used to claim universal applicability where it does not fit (e.g., in secular or pluralistic contexts)."
  ]
}

parsed_json.communicative_function: Prescribing a spiritual practice aimed at deepening connection with a higher power and aligning personal will with divine will.
implicit_claims: A higher power (God) exists and can be contacted.
Prayer and meditation are effective means to improve contact with that higher power.
This higher power has a specific will for each individual.
It is desirable to know and carry out that will.
The individual has the capacity to carry out that will if given power.
parsed_json.coherence_assessment: Internally coherent as a statement of spiritual intention: it outlines a method (prayer/meditation), a goal (improved conscious contact), and a specific focus (seeking knowledge and power to act).
conditions_for_usefulness: The individual believes in a higher power or is open to the concept.
The individual finds prayer or meditation meaningful or effective.
The individual values guidance or surrender of personal will.
The individual is seeking practical alignment between actions and perceived divine purpose.
conditions_for_misleading: If interpreted as requiring belief in a specific deity, it may exclude non-theistic spiritual frameworks.
If taken to imply that personal judgment should be fully abandoned, it could lead to passivity or harmful actions rationalized as divine will.
If the statement is used to claim universal applicability where it does not fit (e.g., in secular or pluralistic contexts).
